Operation 'onboardMerchant' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks information about what is returned (application ID, status) and the side effect that the application enters a pending state for asynchronous processing. Enhanced description provides return value and state change information for better AI agent understanding of operation outcomes.

data.current_description: Submit a new merchant onboarding application with business owner details, business information, and banking details.
data.description_suggestion: Submit a new merchant onboarding application with business owner details, business information, and banking details. Returns an application ID and initial status. The application enters a pending review state and will be processed asynchronously by the onboarding system.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks information about what is returned (application ID, status) and the side effect that the application enters a pending state for asynchronous processing. Enhanced description provides return value and state change information for better AI agent understanding of operation outcomes.

message: Operation 'updateInvoiceStatus' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary is generic. Description mentions preventing access but doesn't clarify required inputs (invoice ID, status value) or what is returned. Added clarity on inputs, outputs, and side effects for better AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Modify an invoice's status to prevent customer access, typically by changing it to Cancelled.
data.summary_suggestion: Update invoice status and access permissions
data.description_suggestion: Modifies an invoice's status to control customer access. Typically used to cancel invoices and prevent further customer interaction. Requires the invoice ID and target status. Returns the updated invoice object. Side effects include immediate revocation of customer access to the invoice.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic. Description mentions preventing access but doesn't clarify required inputs (invoice ID, status value) or what is returned. Added clarity on inputs, outputs, and side effects for better AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'createSmsReminder' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is vague about what 'follow' means and lacks details on required inputs, return value, and scheduling side effects. Enhanced description clarifies the reminder configuration, inputs needed, response, and automatic delivery behavior.

data.current_summary: Create and send an SMS reminder for an invoice
data.current_description: Configure automatic reminder messages that follow an original SMS invoice.
data.description_suggestion: Creates and sends an automatic SMS reminder message for an invoice. Configures reminder timing and message content to follow an original SMS invoice. Requires invoice ID and reminder configuration parameters. Returns confirmation of the reminder creation. Side effects include scheduling automatic message delivery to the customer.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is vague about what 'follow' means and lacks details on required inputs, return value, and scheduling side effects. Enhanced description clarifies the reminder configuration, inputs needed, response, and automatic delivery behavior.

message: Operation 'getSubscriptions' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear. Description mentions the ActiveOnly parameter but lacks context about what is returned and the scope (business-level retrieval). Added clarity on return value structure and filtering behavior for better AI agent understanding of available options.

data.current_description: Retrieve subscriptions. Set ActiveOnly to true to retrieve only active subscriptions.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all subscriptions for the authenticated business. Accepts an optional ActiveOnly parameter to filter results to only active subscriptions. Returns a list of subscription objects with details including customer, payment method, and status. Supports filtering to improve query efficiency.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear. Description mentions the ActiveOnly parameter but lacks context about what is returned and the scope (business-level retrieval). Added clarity on return value structure and filtering behavior for better AI agent understanding of available options.

message: Operation 'getSubscriptionById' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is too generic about what 'detailed information' includes. data.current_description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific subscription.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific subscription by its ID. Returns comprehensive subscription data including customer details, payment method, billing schedule, and current status. Requires valid subscription ID as input.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is too generic about what 'detailed information' includes. Added specificity about required input (subscription ID) and what data is returned (customer details, payment method, billing schedule, status) to help AI agents understand the operation's scope.

message: Operation 'cancelSubscription' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear. Description is minimal and lacks details about required input format, return value, and important side effects (stopping charges, customer notification). Enhanced description clarifies inputs, outputs, and state changes for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Cancel an active subscription by its ID.
data.description_suggestion: Cancels an active subscription by its ID, terminating the recurring payment plan. Requires the subscription ID as input. Returns confirmation of cancellation with the updated subscription status. Side effects include stopping all future recurring charges and notifying the customer of cancellation.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear. Description is minimal and lacks details about required input format, return value, and important side effects (stopping charges, customer notification). Enhanced description clarifies inputs, outputs, and state changes for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'updateCustomer' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description lacks clarity about what customer fields can be updated, what is returned, and the side effects of the operation. Enhanced description specifies identification requirements, partial update support, return value, and immediate persistence to help AI agents understand the operation's full scope and effects.

data.current_description: Updates customer information. Either ExternalID or IndividualID must be provided to identify the customer.
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing customer's information in the contact database. Requires either ExternalID or IndividualID to identify the target customer. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated customer object with all current information. Changes are immediately reflected in the system.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks clarity about what customer fields can be updated, what is returned, and the side effects of the operation. Enhanced description specifies identification requirements, partial update support, return value, and immediate persistence to help AI agents understand the operation's full scope and effects.

message: Operation 'getMessages' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Current description is too generic and lacks details about filtering capabilities, expected inputs, and response structure. Enhanced description clarifies what filters are available, what data is returned in each message object, and message type support to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Retrieve messages sent to and received by a business through Everyware's platform.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves messages sent to and received by a business through the Everyware platform. Accepts filter criteria via request body to narrow results by date range, message type, contact, or other parameters. Returns an array of message objects containing sender, recipient, content, timestamp, and delivery status. Supports both SMS and MMS messages.
data.reasoning: Current description is too generic and lacks details about filtering capabilities, expected inputs, and response structure. Enhanced description clarifies what filters are available, what data is returned in each message object, and message type support to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'fetchSmsMessages' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description mentions filter types but lacks clarity about response structure and whether the operation has side effects. Enhanced description specifies what data is returned in each message object, pagination behavior, and explicitly states that the operation is read-only to prevent AI agents from assuming state changes.

data.current_description: Retrieve SMS messages with various filter criteria including date range, direction, and contact information.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves SMS messages filtered by date range, message direction (inbound/outbound), contact information, and other criteria specified in the request. Returns an array of SMS message objects containing sender, recipient, message content, timestamp, and delivery status. Results are paginated if applicable. Does not modify message state or mark messages as read.
data.reasoning: Current description mentions filter types but lacks clarity about response structure and whether the operation has side effects. Enhanced description specifies what data is returned in each message object, pagination behavior, and explicitly states that the operation is read-only to prevent AI agents from assuming state changes.

Current description lacks details about template variable substitution, what is returned, and the side effect of queuing messages for delivery. Enhanced description clarifies template usage, return value structure, and the immediate action of message queuing to help AI agents understand the operation's full scope.

data.current_summary: Send a message using a pre-created template
data.current_description: Send SMS or MMS messages to contacts using pre-created templates from the Everyware Portal.
data.description_suggestion: Sends SMS or MMS messages to specified contacts using pre-created templates defined in the Everyware Portal. Template variables can be substituted with contact-specific data. Returns a message object containing the message ID, delivery status, and timestamp. Messages are queued for immediate delivery through the messaging platform.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks details about template variable substitution, what is returned, and the side effect of queuing messages for delivery. Enhanced description clarifies template usage, return value structure, and the immediate action of message queuing to help AI agents understand the operation's full scope.

Current description is too brief and lacks critical details about what is created, what is returned, and the persistence of the invoice. data.current_description: Create and send individual invoice links by text, email or both.
data.description_suggestion: Creates an invoice and sends a payment link to the specified contact via SMS, email, or both channels. The invoice is stored in the system and assigned a unique ID. Returns an invoice object containing the invoice ID, payment link, recipient contact information, and delivery status. The invoice link remains active until payment is received or the invoice is manually cancelled.
data.reasoning: Current description is too brief and lacks critical details about what is created, what is returned, and the persistence of the invoice. Enhanced description clarifies the creation and delivery process, return value structure, and the state of the invoice after creation to improve AI agent understanding of the operation's effects.

message: Operation 'sendInvoice' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Current description lacks clarity about what constitutes a 'non-Everyware invoice', what is returned, and the operational flow. Enhanced description clarifies the distinction from native invoices, specifies return value structure, and explains the queuing and delivery process to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation versus createInvoice.

data.current_description: Submit a non-Everyware invoice into the system for queuing and delivery through messaging channels.
data.description_suggestion: Submits a non-Everyware-generated invoice into the Everyware system for queuing and delivery through SMS, email, or other messaging channels. The invoice document is stored and assigned a tracking ID. Returns a response object containing the submission ID, delivery status, and scheduled delivery timestamp. The invoice is queued for immediate processing and delivery to the specified recipient.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks clarity about what constitutes a 'non-Everyware invoice', what is returned, and the operational flow. Enhanced description clarifies the distinction from native invoices, specifies return value structure, and explains the queuing and delivery process to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation versus createInvoice.
